description_long: This is a compact, retro-styled toaster with a rounded rectangular body finished in a matte red color, accented by a black base and a metallic gray top. The front panel features a lever, a circular knob, and several small indicator lights, suggesting multiple toasting settings and functions. The top surface has two wide, parallel toast slots with metallic trim, suitable for standard bread slices. The sides are smooth and unadorned, while the back is gently curved with no visible controls. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a hint of vintage charm, making it suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or communal spaces. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with a sturdy, durable construction.
description: A compact, retro-inspired red toaster with a black base, metallic gray top, and dual toast slots. The front features a lever, knob, and indicator lights for various toasting functions.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, curved red body and black base, with a protruding lever and knob visible on the right.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main control panel with a lever, circular knob, and several indicator lights, as well as the two toast slots on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a smooth red surface and no visible controls.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the gently curved back of the toaster, with no controls or features visible.
attribute_control_knobs: One circular knob on the front, metallic with a black center, located below the lever and indicator lights.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular toast slots on the top, spaced evenly apart with metallic trim.
